prompt: Any open loops I should know about?

failures: expected at least one of [getMyTasks, getActionItemsAndInsights] to fire — none did
score.finalText:

items.description: Send a follow-up requiring a payment date, payment confirmation, or written payment plan if Katie Conner does not respond to the May 11 request about Westfield Collective's two invoices over 60 days late.
items.sourceTitle: Teams DM Conversation: 19:c4beb912-

items.title: Approve QuickBooks cutover controls and accountant offer
items.description: Approve the accountant offer position and require a written QuickBooks pilot/cutover plan plus an AP/AR control matrix before company-wide implementation.
items.sourceTitle: Teams DM Conversation: 19:c4beb912-

items.description: Provide the demo plan for Eye Surgeons of Indiana at 2020 Meridian that coincides with the initial space plan, so the landlord can prepare an initial construction number.
items.sourceTitle: Email: RE: Eye Surgeons of Indiana - Anderson Location Space Plan

items.title: List estimated freight on quote
items.description: If freight is included in the updated proposal, list the estimated freight on the quote for the Nexcom G2P Exotec Sprinklers proposal.
items.sourceTitle: Email: Re: Nexcom G2P Exotec Sprinklers

items.title: Confirm payment status
items.description: Let Kayce know whether payment was made for the January pay application balance of $50,236.56 for Westfield Collective, or if her records are not posted correctly.
items.sourceTitle: Email: Payment

items.description: Share your calendar with Jazmin.

items.title: Confirm bank detail letter
items.description: Misty Rogers asked Brandon Clymer whether he has a bank detail letter from the bank on bank letterhead with the bank details, since the in-house version is not sufficient.
items.sourceTitle: Email: Re: Alleato ACH Payment Form

items.title: Respond about feature interest
items.description: Let Marzia Romano know if Brandon is interested in getting featured in the MSN article "Top 10 Trailblazing Entrepreneurs to Watch in 2026" so she can onboard him.
items.sourceTitle: Email: Brandon x Pressiqa - MSN Magazine

items.title: Confirm bank detail letter availability
items.description: Misty Rogers asked Brandon Clymer whether he has a bank detail letter from the bank on bank letterhead showing the routing and account details, since the in-house version is not sufficient.
items.sourceTitle: Email: Re: Alleato ACH Payment Form

items.title: Review Instagram cover
items.description: Review the Instagram post cover option and let Aisun know if it looks good.
items.sourceTitle: Teams DM Conversation: Alleato Marketing

items.title: Send normal question to Alleato AI
items.description: Send any normal (non-ping) question to the Alleato AI bot in Teams, such as "what projects do I have," so Claude Code can query the tracker database and identify which bot message-handler step is breaking.
items.sourceTitle: Teams DM Conversation: 19:38f414d6-
